narration_script.narration: Technology is changing the world, and learning begins with one practical step.
narration_script.subtitle: From learning to creating: start with computer science.

narration_script.narration: At the Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering, National University of Tainan, students build foundations in programming, systems, and problem solving.
narration_script.subtitle: National University of Tainan CSIE

narration_script.narration: Courses connect software, AI, data, networks, and hands-on practice, helping students turn ideas into working projects.
narration_script.subtitle: Programming, AI, data, systems, networks, and practice

narration_script.narration: Through discussion, teamwork, demos, and project development, students learn not only how to code, but how to communicate and solve real problems.
narration_script.subtitle: Teamwork, projects, demos, and problem solving

narration_script.narration: In Tainan, learning is close to daily life, and every project becomes part of a future path.
narration_script.subtitle: Study in Tainan, build your future

narration_script.narration: National University of Tainan CSIE: learn steadily, create bravely.
narration_script.subtitle: NUTN CSIE

revision_note: The script avoids unverified claims about ranking, employment rate, facilities, or admission data.
